title: Maximum Subarray Sum

content.problemStatement:
Given an integer array numsnumsnums, find the **subarray** with the largest sum, and print its sum.

**Note**: A subarray is a contiguous non-empty sequence of elements within an array.


Input Format

The first line contains TTT, the number of test cases.
The first line in each test case contains NNN, the number of elements in an array.
The second line in each test case contains NNN integers, denoting the elements in the array.


Output Format
For each test case, output the maximum subarray sum of each array.
content.inputFormat: First line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. For each test case, the first line contains an integer N, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains N space‑separated integers denoting the array.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output a single line containing the maximum possible sum of any non‑empty contiguous subarray.

sampleTestCases.explanation: First array: maximum subarray is [4, -1, 2, 1] with sum 6. Second array: only element 1, sum 1. Third array: all elements sum to 23, which is the maximum.
All numbers are negative, so the best subarray is the largest single element -1. All numbers are positive, so the whole array sum 6 is maximal.
Kadane's algorithm yields a maximum sum of 6 from subarray [2, 3, -4, 5].

solution.approach: The problem asks for the maximum sum over all contiguous subarrays. The optimal solution is Kadane's algorithm, which scans the array while maintaining the best subarray ending at the current position. For each element x we update current = max(x, current + x) – either we start a new subarray at x or extend the previous one. The global answer is the maximum of all current values. This runs in linear time and uses O(1) extra space, satisfying the constraints.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) per test case, O(total N) over all test cases.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few variables are used irrespective of N.

code.Java: import java.io.*;import java.util.*;public class Main{public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception{BufferedReader br=new BufferedReader(new InputStreamReader(System.in));StringBuilder sb=new StringBuilder();int T=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());for(int t=0;t<T;++t){int N=Integer.parseInt(br.readLine().trim());StringTokenizer st=new StringTokenizer(br.readLine());long x=Long.parseLong(st.nextToken());long cur=x,best=x;for(int i=1;i<N;++i){x=Long.parseLong(st.nextToken());cur=Math.max(x,cur+x);best=Math.max(best,cur);}sb.append(best);if(t<T-1) sb.append('\n');}System.out.print(sb.toString());}}
